name: demo_area_menu
_doc: DEMO B of the Slice-5 interaction demo — AREA -> MENU. A Sensor in proximity mode emits the DISTANCE between the player position (an Input reading the abstract 'player.pos' [x,y,z] from the per-frame frame, injected by the room each tick) and a fixed area centre (a Const vector). A Compare thresholds that distance against a radius (distance < radius => inside the area). A Select picks the menu payload when inside and an empty payload otherwise; the WorldAction fires ui.menu.open with the picked { title, items }, which the mounted UI renderer draws. Entering the area opens the menu; leaving it closes (empty payload). Sensor/Input/Compare/Select/WorldAction are all landed — no new primitive.
